transformation_logic: Join bureau_balance to bureau through SK_ID_BUREAU and aggregate monthly status counts and late-status counts to SK_ID_CURR.
aggregation_level: Applicant level from historical bureau monthly status
availability_time: Must include only monthly statuses visible before the current decision or collections scoring timestamp.
production_controls: Filter MONTHS_BALANCE/status snapshots by observation cutoff, validate bureau linkage integrity, and monitor late-status distribution drift.
